result.summary: Found a few layout issues where horizontally arranged content is clipped or partially hidden, suggesting the page does not fully fit the viewport.

issues.description: The top category strip is cut off on the right, with the 'Hot Games' pill partially visible and the row extending beyond the screen.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the container width, spacing, or enable proper horizontal scrolling so the full category list is accessible and not clipped.

issues.description: Several game tiles in the featured sections are partially cropped on the right edge, making some cards unreadable/incomplete.
issues.suggestion: Reflow the grid to fit the viewport, reduce card widths, or allow a clean horizontal scroll instead of clipping cards at the edge.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game row, obscuring part of the content near the bottom of the screen.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding/margin to the content area equal to the nav height, or make the bottom nav non-overlapping so the last row remains fully visible.
